rationale: Educ. Code §29.011 governs special education transition planning and is wholly unrelated to the property tax homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No operative overlap exists.
quote: The commissioner shall by rule adopt procedures for compliance with federal requirements relating to transition services for students who are enrolled in special education programs under this subchapter.
_note: No conflict. The proposed homestead exemption increase has no bearing on special education transition planning requirements.
